title: The Dragon Glass Map
series: The Adventures of Elizabeth and Scarlet
status: Old inline SVG sketches removed from the reader. Use these 25 prompts to generate replacement chapter art.

styleBible.format: landscape chapter plate, 16:9 or 3:2, high-resolution WebP
styleBible.visualDirection: premium middle-grade fantasy, cinematic storybook realism, luminous but not cartoonish
styleBible.continuity: Elizabeth has dark blonde hair and neon-blue skates; Scarlet has auburn hair and red skates; Cinder is an emerald baby dragon with violet eyes, gold horns, velvet wings, glittery golden smoke.
styleBible.avoid: flat vector art, generic clipart, mismatched ages, random costumes, text inside image, distorted faces, extra limbs, muddy dark crops

illustrations.title: Royal Detectives
illustrations.caption: A signature moment from Royal Detectives: The sign appeared on the door of the Ladybug Room the morning after the confession. illustrations.title: The Royal Hawaiian Jet
illustrations.caption: A signature moment from The Royal Hawaiian Jet: The Hawaii announcement happened at breakfast, which was where all the significant announcements in the family happened, on the theory that no one could react dramatically while eating. illustrations.title: The Collector's Net
illustrations.caption: A signature moment from The Collector's Net: The net came without warning. One moment the ceiling vent was just a ceiling vent, casting a column of afternoon light into the chamber, and then it was full of silver — a net, dense and fine-mesh, dropping through the opening in a controlled fall, its edges spreading as it fell to cover the maximum possible area. It fell toward Cinder.
